ddls:
CREATE TABLE "composers" (
  "composer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each composer */,
  "composer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the composer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the composer */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the composer */,
  "dod" TEXT /* Date of death of the composer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the composer */,
  "period" TEXT /* Musical period of the composer */,
  "instrumentation" TEXT /* Typical instruments used by the composer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the composer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the composer record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the composer record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the composer record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "composer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the composer who created the collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the collection was published */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "catalogue_number" TEXT /* Catalogue number of the collection */,
  "opus_number" TEXT /* Opus number of the collection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collection record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collection record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the collection record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the collection record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_composer_id FOREIGN KEY ("composer_id") REFERENCES composers ("composer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection the movement belongs to */,
  "movement_name" TEXT /* Name of the movement */,
  "movement_number" TEXT /* Number of the movement within the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the movement */,
  "tempo" TEXT /* Tempo of the movement */,
  "time_signature" TEXT /* Time signature of the movement */,
  "key_signature" TEXT /* Key signature of the movement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movement record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movement record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the movement record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the movement record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movements_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movement the score belongs to */,
  "score_name" TEXT /* Name of the score */,
  "score_availability" TEXT /* Availability of the score (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the score */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the score */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* File size of the score */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the score record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the score record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_movement_id FOREIGN KEY ("movement_id") REFERENCES movements ("movement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., musicologist, performer, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the score */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the score */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user who accessed the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES scores ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the score */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES scores ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the user to the score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the comment record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES scores ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "tag_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the tag record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "score_tags" (
  "score_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score-tag association */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the association */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_tags_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES scores ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
